nasb.text: The next day we put in at Sidon; and Julius treated Paul with consideration and allowed him to go to his friends and receive care.

esv.text: The next day we put in at Sidon. And Julius treated Paul kindly and gave him leave to go to his friends and be cared for.

cnv.text: 第二天到了西頓，猶流寬待保羅，准他去看看朋友，接受他們的招待。

ccb.text: 第二天，船停泊在西顿港，犹流宽待保罗，准他探望当地的朋友，接受他们的照应。

csbs.text: 第二天，我们在西顿靠岸。犹利乌斯宽待保罗，准许他到朋友那里去接受照顾。
